title: Monitor spec validator — validateMonitor() checking spec + agent YAML + classify template against schemas and available collectors
body: validateWorkflow() checks workflow YAML specs at authoring time — agent resolution, schema existence, template-input alignment, step references, etc. No equivalent exists for monitor specs. An LLM authoring a monitor gets no feedback until runtime. validateMonitor(spec, cwd) would check: classify.agent resolves to an existing .agent.yaml, the agent YAML's prompt.task.template resolves in the template search paths, classify.context entries are valid collector names (from COLLECTOR_DESCRIPTORS), the verdict.schema.json exists at the agent's output.schema path, pattern and instruction files exist. Returns { status, issues[] } matching ValidationResult. Exposed via /monitors validate [name] command and monitors-validate tool. Added to the VALIDATION_CHECKS registry. The skill generator surfaces it in the validation vocabulary table.
